Reference Page Steven Woods

Patents and Publications

Curated active reference page for selected books, patents, and academic publications associated with Steven Gregory Woods.

Open style guide Open ResearchGate Open archive reference
Source of truth: This page is rebuilt from public/data/publications.bib. Canonical publisher or DOI links remain primary, while recovered Spectra archive PS/PDF artifacts are surfaced here when they are available.

Books

Constraint-Based Design Recovery for Software Reengineering: Theory and Experiments

SG Woods, AE Quilici, Q Yang. Springer Science & Business Media 1997.
View on Springer

Active publications are rendered from a shared bibliography source and linked back to the recovered Spectra archive when matching artifacts exist, so the active page and archive references do not drift separately.
